question: [File: 'File Name: rest-java/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/restjava/service/TopicServiceImpl.java -> Scope: High: Preventing gossip of a transaction or multiple transactions'] [Function: findById(EntityId id)] Can an unprivileged external user flood the REST API endpoint GET /api/v1/topics/{id} with rapid sequential calls using non-existent topic IDs, causing topicRepository.findById() to generate a continuous stream of EntityNotFoundException instances, exhausting JVM heap via exception object allocation and preventing legitimate gossip-related topic lookups from completing?
